name: T3-WF-2 invoke denied
description: Same shape as wf-invoke-allowed but WITHOUT the `functions` grant. The agent is told to call the invocation, cannot (gateway scope denial), and must emit a failure report — the run still completes. Version-pinned tier-3 fixture (specs/developing/testing/scenarios.md#T3-WF-2, denied half). No required_invocation gate: the tool can never satisfy, so the prompt instructs a best-effort attempt + failure emit instead of looping.

steps.label: Attempt the (ungranted) invocation
steps.prompt: Try to call the capture_event function invocation with { "payload": "{{inputs.payload}}" }. It is not granted to this run, so the call will be denied — do not retry more than once.

steps.label: Emit the failure report
steps.name: result
steps.prompt: Report that the capture_event call was denied and why, based on the error you saw.
